name: teams
description: Microsoft Teams efficiency plugin with SQLite-backed caching for user IDs, chat IDs, team/channel IDs, and messages

hooks.command: echo 'IMPORTANT: Teams cache initialized. Run sync on favorites: use the teams agent to check `python3 teams_cache.py sync needed` and refresh any stale favorites in the background before handling the user request.'
hooks.bash: echo 'IMPORTANT: Teams cache initialized. Run sync on favorites: use the teams agent to check `python3 teams_cache.py sync needed` and refresh any stale favorites in the background before handling the user request.'
